acceptanceCriteria: a GitHub API response carrying a Link header with rel=next is treated as unverifiable so no governance requirement is decided on partially fetched data
list requests for branch rules and environments use per_page=100 to make truncation rare while remaining fail-closed when it occurs
unverifiable finding details say the configuration could not be fully read, covering both permission and pagination causes
README finding lists label the CODEOWNERS check as sampled early warning, not proof, in both languages
unit tests cover the Link rel=next unverifiable behavior
npm run test:all passes and the verification covers the full pull-request change set
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
